Welcome to this exceptional opportunity to own a piece of history, located in a picturesque rural setting on a one-acre lot, but with a Champaign address and unparalleled proximity and access to in-town amenities. This small subdivision of historic homes was the result of a developer's vision more than 30 years ago to relocate and refurbish  vintage homes from all over the county, and this cluster of one-acre lots was platted to provide spacious lots on which to relocate these architectural and historic gems. This particular home's history dates back to the late 1800s in rural Sadorus. A small country church was built on the Goodman property south of Sadorus.  In time that church was no longer in use.  Then in the 1930's the church was dismantled, and an architect designed a home based on the available lumber for the Goodman family.  Mrs. Goodman is reported to have insisted that it was built strong. Indeed, the rafters are 6X6 beams.  After the home was no longer needed by the Goodman's it was sold to the current owners in 1989.  The home was moved from rural Sadorus to its present location early 1989 when the ground was frozen and then put on its new foundation around April of that year. Besides the new 9-foot basement foundation, HVAC and all electrical components were updated at that time. Much of the original features--including built-ins and some of the kitchen cabinets--were intentionally left intact for historic integrity. The current owners placed an oversize two-car garage on the property, just a few steps from the kitchen entrance. Years later, they finished the attic into two rooms plus a second full bath. The house has been cleaned up and cleaned out, ready for the next owner to make repairs and improvements worthy of this home's quality and history. A prelisting inspection is on file from November 2023. The house is priced for an as-is sale. See HD photo gallery and 3D virtual tour.

This one-of-a-kind legacy retreat, only minutes from the University of Illinois, features rolling topography with a New England vibe right here in Central Illinois. In the early 60s, Professor Milt Holcomb located a rare patch of Northeast Urbana's remaining Big Grove Forest and built this Dutch Colonial as a homage to his New England roots. Since then, this unique property has had three other owners, including a university chancellor. Only minutes from the University of Illinois, Farmer's Market, and other urban amenities, the natural wonderland of "Holcomb Woods" is one of Urbana's best-kept secrets. The home's evolution over the last decade has included solid walnut features made from timber found on the property; modern Amish cabinetry throughout; soapstone, quartz, and granite counters; and hard surface natural brick, slate, ceramic, and 3/4 inch hardwood floors. This estate offers abundant storage and options for multigenerational living, home business, and office spaces. Surrounding these spaces are a series of walkways, patios, decks, and gardens that bring a sense of order and utility to the wooded environment. With a built-in natural gas fire pit, the patio is a perfect spot for outdoor entertainment. Hard-wired speakers cover living and dining areas inside and outside. Complete with irrigated raised beds, established fruit trees, and nature walks stretching to the Saline Branch, this retreat is a nature enthusiast's dream. Every detail at 2804 E. Concord Road has been thoughtfully curated-merging luxury, versatility, and the peaceful embrace of nature. This isn't just a home; it's a legacy property ready to welcome its next chapter. Schedule your private tour today!

An expansive, light-filled second floor features generous workspace with multiple desks and remarkable versatility-easily adaptable for additional living space, a custom retreat, or something entirely unique. Unfinished dormer and attic areas offer abundant storage and the potential for a bedroom suite with private bath and walk-in closet.   A striking staircase leads to a unique lookout tower above the second floor, offering breathtaking, elevated views of the surrounding ponds and local wildlife-a perfect retreat for quiet reflection or enjoying the natural beauty of the neighborhood.  The lower level artfully blends contemporary and light industrial design, featuring two bedrooms positioned for privacy, a generous family/rec room at the center, and seamless access to the outdoors.  Step out to a private patio with a fire pit-an idyllic spot to enjoy the tranquil pond and frequent visits from the resident swans.  Distinctive architectural details-including custom metal railings, designer exterior lighting, and integrated landscape features-create a harmonious connection between the home and its stunning natural surroundings.  The result is a living experience that feels both luxurious and deeply rooted in the beauty of the neighborhood.  This neighborhood allows the convenience of living just steps from the vibrant shopping, dining, and cafe scene of The Crossing-an amenity-rich, accessible neighborhood seamlessly connected by a thoughtfully designed trail system that further enhances the unique appeal of this property.  This architect-designed residence is a rare blend of architectural artistry, functional luxury, and natural beauty-offering a lifestyle and setting that few can rival!  Contact your Realtor for a feature sheet detailing the updates and upgrades for this property.

Here's your chance to get into desirable Myra Ridge without paying someone else's premium. This 3 bed, 2 bath ranch sits on a quiet cul-de-sac with cathedral ceilings, 2-car garage, and a nice deck. The bones are solid, the layout works great, and you can make it exactly what you want without overpaying for choices that aren't yours. Perfect opportunity to build sweat equity in a neighborhood that rarely sees inventory. Looking for buyers who see potential and want to create something special.

Price to sell! Don't miss this great opportunity! Located at the popular Ashland Park Subdivison, this well-maintained ranch features three bedrooms and 2 full bathrooms. The eat-in kitchen flows to the combo dining and living room with the cathedral ceiling. The master bedroom has its own full bathroom and walk-in closet. Other two bedrooms share another full bathroom. The backyard is fenced which provides more prviate space. The house is close to shoppings, restaurants, bus lines, and highways. The new garage door in 2025.

Welcome to this beautifully maintained 2-bedroom, 1-bath home that blends comfort and convenience in a peaceful neighborhood. This inviting property features a bright and functional layout with cozy living spaces. Step outside and enjoy the large, fully fenced backyard - ideal for pets, entertaining, or relaxing evenings under the stars. The washer & dryer new January 2024. The attached driveway provides off-street parking and easy access to the home. Don't miss this opportunity to own a charming home with room to grow and a backyard retreat ready for your personal touch!
Cute 3 bedroom 1 1/2 bath home ready for it's new owner. Fenced in yard, screened in porch with bonus room attached. Bonus room has primarily been used as an office.

Welcome to this beautifully maintained three-bedroom, two-bath home nestled in the desirable Myra Ridge subdivision. Step inside to discover a great floor plan with spacious living areas that are filled with natural light from the new Pella windows, and a new roof adds peace of mind for years to come.  The kitchen comes fully equipped with all appliances included, making it move-in ready. Enjoy relaxing or entertaining in the wonderful backyard, where western exposure provides gorgeous sunsets over the serene water views.  Additional highlights include a two-car garage for ample storage and parking, walking path behind home, near Christie/Carle, shopping, restaurants and coffee shops and bus service AND home is located only three blocks from South Ridge Park featuring a walking path and playground!  This is a fantastic opportunity to own a home in a sought-after neighborhood that truly has it all.

Step into unmatched craftsmanship in this custom built zero-lot home, designed in the classic Arts and Crafts style by renowned builder Willard Helmuth. Known for precision and quality, Helmuth's work is evident throughout, from the honey maple hardwood floors to the intricate custom woodwork and built-ins that define the space. The Great Room features a vaulted ceiling, fireplace, and a versatile layout that welcomes any furniture arrangement. The kitchen is both beautiful and functional, showcasing Corian countertops, an island, stainless steel appliances, and a Fisher & Paykel dishwasher. The main-level Master Suite offers a peaceful retreat with a private bath and walk-in closet. A cozy family room/study, powder room, and laundry area complete the first floor. Upstairs, you'll find two spacious bedrooms, one with an adjoining office/bonus room. Additionally, upstairs features another full bath, lounging area, and a large walk-in attic for extra storage. Enjoy the outdoors from multiple spaces, including a recessed front porch, Trex deck, and private patio off the Master Suite, all surrounded by mature privacy landscaping. Built with Hardie Board and River Stone exterior for lasting durability. Walking trails located directly behind the home that lead to the neighborhood park. Well-maintained and extremely gently lived in, this home boasts recent updates including a new roof and exterior paint (2020), furnace (2021), full interior paint and carpet (2021), and a new water heater (2025). Central air compressor also recently replaced. Basement offers mechanical access and additional storage. Must see home- schedule your private showing today!
Sold at list

Charming and well-maintained 2-bedroom, 1-bath home in a convenient Champaign location-this is a great opportunity for first-time buyers or those looking to downsize! The bright living room flows seamlessly into the kitchen, which features built-in shelving for added functionality. Two comfortable bedrooms share a full bath on the main level. The unfinished basement offers great storage space and potential for future expansion. Recent updates include a new roof (2024) and chimney tuck pointing. Pre-inspected for your convenience, schedule a showing today!

Enter into nearly 1,900 square feet of stylish comfort in this split-level home, nestled in a quiet Urbana neighborhood. With 4 bedrooms, 2 full bathrooms, and multiple living areas, this home is thoughtfully designed for families, remote work, and everyday living.  The welcoming split-level layout offers an ideal balance of openness and privacy. Upstairs, cathedral ceilings and a skylight flood the main living room with natural light, creating an inviting space for both relaxed living and entertaining. The galley-style kitchen provides all essential appliances and access to the deck and fully fenced backyard perfect for outdoor enjoyment.  Downstairs, you'll find a spacious family room and two additional bedrooms, one of which is smaller and could serve as an office space, perfect for growing households or work-from-home needs. Hardwood, laminate, and tile floors flow throughout the home, while central air keeps things cool in summer and a high-efficiency boiler ensures warmth in winter. A detached two-car garage adds convenience with extra storage and workshop space.

Must See New Construction. Walk in through a stunning 8 foot front door into the entry highlighting the formal dining room and/or office. The open great room, breakfast area and kitchen is the perfect combination of space for day-to-day living as well as entertaining. Beautiful finishes and design elements throughout including custom trim work. Hardwood floors on the first floor. Well appointed kitchen with large custom island, white cabinets, and a custom hood. Quartz countertops with tiled backsplash. Let's don't forget the butler's pantry with a walk-in pantry too. Large laundry room and a picture perfect custom locker system with window bench. Upstairs, the primary suite feels warm and cozy with neutral carpeting and boasts an attached full bath and walk-in closet. Three additional bedrooms and a full bath complete the upper level. Take advantage of the additional living space in the basement featuring a gym, spacious family/rec. room, fifth bedroom and a full bath. From the tall ceilings to the fully sodded and landscaped yard nothing was overlooked by this builder. This home has everything you could need and every space has been designed with comfort and elegance in mind.

Spacious Home in Prime Savoy Location! Nestled in the established and sought-after area of Savoy, this spacious 4-bedroom, 2.5-bath home offers ample square footage of comfortable living space. Enjoy two separate living areas, a formal dining room, and a smart floorplan with plenty of storage throughout.  The home backs to a scenic trail and is surrounded by mature landscaping, offering privacy and peaceful views. The extra-large unfinished basement provides endless possibilities-customize it to suit your needs and lifestyle!  With a 2-car garage and a fantastic layout, this one has everything you've been waiting for. Homes in this area don't last-schedule your showing today and make it yours before it's gone!

Welcome to 2707 Clayton Blvd in Champaign a move-in ready 3 bedroom, 2 bathroom home with a 2-car garage and a fully fenced yard, perfect for both relaxing and entertaining. Step inside to find updated vinyl flooring throughout, some updated paint, modern lighting, and a cozy wood-burning fireplace that anchors the main living space. The kitchen has been refreshed with new countertops, while the second bathroom features an updated sink and vanity. Major mechanicals have been taken care of with a newer A/C unit (2019), water heater, and a washer/dryer set from 2020. Enjoy the peace of mind that comes with beautifully updated landscaping and even a doggie septic tank for pet convenience. This home blends comfort and function in a great location don't miss your chance to make it yours!

Investment opportunity in the heart of Urbana! Located just minutes from the University of Illinois, 1008 E Florida Ave is a 2 bedroom, 1.5 bath home with a 2-car garage and a fully fenced backyard. This property is currently tenant-occupied through July 31, 2026, with a strong rental income of $1,350/month. Tenants are responsible for all utilities and lawn care, making this a truly hands-off investment. Professionally managed by JSJ Property Management and being sold as-is, this is a great chance to own a well-located, income-producing property with consistent cash flow from day one.

Experience all the benefits of Brand New Construction at an affordable price with this 3 Bedroom, 2 Bath Ranch-Style home with an unfinished basement, located in Savannah Green Subdivision. This home will also qualify for the THINK URBANA tax abatement program allowing you to save even more for years to come!!! Enjoy over 1375 sq. ft on the main floor with an open concept kitchen, dining and living space. Features include laundry room, energy efficient vinyl windows, quartz countertops, shaker style cabinetry, luxury vinyl plank flooring throughout main floor, upgraded lighting and quality Delta plumbing fixtures. The primary suite will have an attached bath and walk-in closet, while the two additional bedrooms share a second full bathroom.The full unfinished basement has plenty of space for storage and roughed in plumbing for a 3rd bath. The exterior of the home will have durable vinyl siding and a 2 car detached garage. This home, brought to you by builder C-U Under Construction, offers the perfect balance of affordability and modern convenience.  Ask us about additional lots!

description: Don't let the address fool you-this home has unbeatable convenience.    Lovingly cared for and filled with memories, this solid brick ranch offers a rare opportunity to create your next chapter in one of Champaign's most amenity-filled locations. With driveway access tucked away on quiet Kent Court, you get the best of both worlds: privacy and proximity.    Step through the nostalgic saloon doors and into a traditional layout with generously sized rooms, including a welcoming living space filled with natural light, a spacious dining area perfect for gatherings, and a kitchen with timeless cabinetry and plenty of prep space. Just off the kitchen is a cozy spot ideal for casual dining or a sitting area-great for morning coffee or evening chats. The home features three bedrooms with great closet storage, including a generously sized primary bedroom, plus 1.5 bathrooms and charming vintage details throughout that speak to its legacy of love and upkeep.    This home's location offers unmatched convenience with shopping, dining, parks, and bike trails in every direction-plus more than one place to grab ice cream within a mile. You're just steps from bus routes that connect to Parkland College, the University of Illinois, Carle Hospital, and North Champaign's retail corridor. Interstate access is just a few miles away in either direction, making commuting simple.

Lovely Home in desirable Trails at Chestnut Grove Subdivision & Lovely Sunset Views too! This Home greets you with a 2-Story Foyer and tons of natural light.  Details include: Coffered Ceiling in formal dining area, with lovely framing of both eat-in kitchen entry into Great Room w/Gas Log Fireplace, Custom Plantation Shutters, and Custom Shades. The Kitchen is light & bright with Pristine Island, Large Counter Spaces & Walk-in Pantry.  A total of 6 Bedrooms, featuring 1 Bedroom & Full Bath on the 1st Floor, 2nd Floor offers 4 Bedrooms upstairs, featuring the Primary Suite, and one of the Bedrooms is being used as very nice Home Office. Upstairs also features a convenient Large Laundry Room w/spacious Folding Area & Utility Sink. The Basement offers a Large Family/Rec Room. And these sellers have added the 6th Large Bedroom in the Basement, with a Private Sitting area, attached Full Bath, and Walk-in Closet. Now a total of 4 Full Baths in the home.  These owners have also added more Enjoyment Spaces to the Rear Yard having now a Larger Patio, Brick Firepit w/Sitting Wall, a Play structure--all Fully Fenced to enjoy both day and night.  Invite your guest to also enjoy the convenience of your Circle Driveway, Evening Outdoor Lighting & Custom Landscaping. Or enjoy all the walking paths with sidewalks around the neighborhood or fishing or canoeing on the 2 area ponds.  And just 2 minutes away by car, enjoy Porter Park. Whether wanting to stay quietly tucked away in the neighborhood, or out for a quick run, all of the following: Groceries, restaurants, coffee shops, and pharmacies are less than a 10 minute drive from home. Make your appointment today and see for yourself.

Welcome to this beautifully maintained 4-bedroom ranch with backyard views of the golf course and nestled in a peaceful setting on a culdesac. Step inside the double front doors to find vaulted ceilings, new engineered hardwood flooring throughout the main living space and hallway, complimented by large windows with automatic blinds that fill the space with natural light. Enjoy year round views from the bright and inviting four seasons room, ideal for relaxing or entertaining. Outside has so much to offer with a composite deck, large fully fenced backyard, gardens, fruit trees and storage galore with a 15 x 20 shed! The owners have done so much to this home including new siding and shed (2021), roof (2021), composite deck (2012), installation of ADA bathroom in master bath and hall bath update (2013), HVAC (2012), tankless water heater (2012), Custom Pantry cabinets with rollouts (2016), professional landscaping (2013). Home has been pre-inspected.

Historical, Affordable and Adorable! The best of both worlds...live in a modern, updated, pristine ranch home, but in the historical section of Urbana! Charming, tree lined brick street with street lights just a few blocks from the Farmers Market and Victory Park!  University Architect designed the impressive renovations. Looks small but lives EXTRA LARGE!  Traditional ranch has great curb appeal with stairs leading to the welcoming front porch. All maintenance free fencing, siding and a Trex decking on the front porch and back deck. Modern open floor plan with soaring high ceilings and QUALITY UPDATES rarely found in this price range!  Acres of gleaming, REFINISHED 3/4" THICK HARDWOOD on the main level and stairs to the lower level. Master masonry tile work showcased throughout.  Two updated full baths both with gorgeous, custom ceramic tile flooring, walls and tub surrounds. Spacious, updated kitchen with custom, quality SCHORCK cabinets and under counter lighting.  Window over the kitchen sink with deck and back yard views. Side door with direct access from the kitchen  to the large, maintenance free Trex deck that overlooks the extra deep, fenced back yard.  Interior recently and professionally painted, ceiling fans in every room and hard wired smoke alarms.  Very efficient use of space with split bedroom design. Both bedrooms, have high ceilings and two windows. The primary has a full custom tiled bath and pocket door to a large walk in closet.  Beautiful tiled main full bath that could be featured in Better Homes and Gardens! Solid wood stairs leading to the lower level with a gigantic bonus room, with 3 windows ,carpet and a walk in closet. Perfect for kids playroom, home office or hobby room! Tons of basement storage plus laundry area. Updated 240 amp electric. Splitter a/c in basement. Roof, complete tear off (2020) New electric water heater (2021) Maintenance free vinyl siding. Replacement windows. New furnace. HUGE Gated and fenced back yard. Wonderful and functional outdoor garden shed/green house with built in work benches and both ends open with double doors. Broadband accessible. Off street drive way parking for at least 5 cars. (plenty of room to add a garage or carport) West Urbana is a wonderful community where friendships blossom & neighbors interact, many who have also lived there for decades! Located in the highly sought after "Grid 56" location, close to the University, Leal School, the Farmers Market, the Co-op food store, & Urbana Free Library. SUPER LOW taxes ONLY ($1,630 A YEAR!) utilities. Home has satisfied all electric, plumbing, HVAC & structural building codes.  Make no mistake, this is not -just another house...it's a one-kind home!  You will NOT BE DISAPPOINTED with this one. So don't miss the opportunity to call it your own. Call to schedule your private showing today!

Fully remodeled and like new in 2025! Come home to your three bedroom, two full bathroom home that boasts a brand new kitchen: All-new paint, flooring, stainless steel appliances, gorgeous cabinets, and gleaming quartz countertops. The sliding glass door and all windows have been replaced, too! A new furnace, air conditioner and water heater will give you a more efficient and maintenance-free home for years to come. Both full bathrooms have been fully remodeled as well! The roof was replaced in 2020, so the home is completely move-in ready. Outside, a large fenced-in backyard awaits you and all of your outdoor needs.

Fantastic location! Nestled on a charming street in the heart of Urbana, this beautifully renovated ranch home is ready to welcome you. Beautifully refinished hardwood floors , all new copper plumbing, electrical updates to current code  I-3 hight speed  Internet insulated attic,  and laundry moved from garage to  home interior.  Enjoy peace of mind with a recent roof, newer HVAC system, and updated siding, windows, and gutters. Inside, you'll find a modern kitchen and an additional full bathroom, creating a fresh and comfortable layout for everyday living. Step outside to discover a spacious deck, perfect for entertaining friends or simply becoming one with nature. Conveniently located near the University of Illinois campus, this home offers fantastic access to everything the area has to offer. Don't miss this incredible opportunity to own a fully updated  home in a popular neighborhood!

Welcome to 216 Brookwood, where timeless charm meets modern updates in every corner. This delightful home greets you with a new front porch, perfect for sipping your morning coffee as neighbors stroll by. Inside, two generous bedrooms and one-and-a-half baths offer comfortable retreats. Sunlight pours into the inviting living room, which flows effortlessly into the adjacent eat-in kitchen, complete with all major appliances for true move-in ease. Head downstairs to your private entertainment haven: a spacious family room anchored by a glowing electric fireplace, a built-in dry bar ready for weekend gatherings, and a convenient basement bathroom/laundry combo where the included washer and dryer are conveniently located. Step outside to discover a fully fenced backyard, ideal for summer barbecues or playtime with pets. The attached one-car garage ensures secure parking and extra storage.With its perfect blend of cozy gathering spaces, smart updates, and bright, airy living areas, 216 Brookwood is more than a house-it's the home you've been dreaming of. Don't wait-schedule your private tour today!

This is an investment opportunity for you. The main level harbors 3 bedrooms, potentially 4 if you convert the attic above, and let's talk about the efficiency apartment already built into the basement. You could live on the main level and rent out the apartment below, which has its own walkout entrance. Take a seat on the front porch and watch the wonders of the U of I college campus only feet away. Walk up the street to the Champaign public library or cross the street and exercise at the anytime gym. Theres plenty of nearby restaurants. This place will need some TLC so bring your vision.

Welcome to 3101 Ladue Drive-where comfort and convenience come together in one of Champaign's most desirable neighborhoods. This lovingly maintained 3-bedroom, 2-bath ranch offers nearly 1,300 square feet of single-level living on a quiet corner lot in the established Westlake subdivision, just steps from Powell Park.  Inside, you'll find a bright and functional layout with an updated eat-in kitchen featuring refinished cabinets, counter height island, and great flow into the cozy living space. A sunroom off the dining area provides extra flexibility-perfect as a second family room, office, or play space.    The crawl space was professionally encapsulated in 2021 with a vapor barrier for peace of mind. Recent updates include a new efficient air conditioner in 2024, roof in 2021, and a brand-new silent garage door opener. The updated driveway (2015) rounds out this move-in ready home.  Outside, enjoy a fenced backyard with low-maintenance landscaping designed for simple, enjoyable outdoor living.  Whether you're a first-time buyer, downsizing, or looking for low-maintenance living in a quiet, park-adjacent setting-this home is a true find.

Charming 3-bedroom, 2-bath ranch in the desirable Southwood neighborhood! This move-in-ready home features an open living area with a cozy fireplace, an eat-in kitchen, and spacious bedrooms. Roof updated around 2020 and AC/Furnace around 2024. Enjoy the fully fenced backyard, perfect for relaxing or entertaining. Conveniently located near parks, schools, and shopping-this one won't last long!

Welcome to 2104 Sumac Drive - a charming and move-in ready 3 bed, 2 bath home in the heart of Champaign! You'll love the fresh paint throughout and new bedroom flooring that perfectly complements the cozy, modern vibe. The spacious living room features a wood-burning fireplace with a new chimney, creating the perfect spot to relax. This home offers plenty of storage, with generous closets throughout and a unique "holiday room" off the back of the home-ideal for seasonal items or bonus space. Enjoy a fully fenced backyard with a patio, perfect for entertaining or relaxing evenings, plus a new storage shed that stays! The 2-car attached garage adds even more convenience. Major updates include a new AC (2024) and roof (2020). All appliances stay, making this home truly move-in ready. Don't miss your chance-this home is the perfect blend of modern comfort and homey charm!

Welcome to your beautiful home on the golf course in the sought-after Stone Creek Subdivision! This lovely ranch-style home boasts luxurious finishes inside and out, from the low-maintenance brick, stone, and LP Smartside exterior, to the well-appointed interior and its attention to detail. The charming front porch with double-door entry leads to an open foyer that immediately draws the eye to the panoramic golf course views through the living areas. The expansive and durable engineered hardwood flooring adorns the first floor rooms, the vaulted ceiling showcases sophisticated light fixtures, and plenty of space encourages versatile furniture placement. The floor plan is delightfully open to maximize natural light. The spacious eat-in kitchen shines with granite countertops, a center island, built-in instant hot water, and a convenient pantry cabinet near the refrigerator and island. There are multiple ways to access your outside oasis via sliding doors which lead to a covered patio overlooking the fenced backyard with extensive landscaping, golf course, and breathtaking Illinois sunsets! An additional patio has been added to extend outdoor entertaining closer to the grill area. Back inside, retreat to the secluded owner's suite with two walk-in closets, a spacious private bath with dual vanities, soaking tub, and separate shower with a frameless glass enclosure. Two additional bedrooms, a full bathroom, and a dedicated laundry room complete the main level. Most of the basement has been finished and offers premium carpeting underfoot. The large family room area boasts several entertaining options, including a theater space with superior surround sound, a wall-mounted 65-inch television, and AV equipment. A wet bar is centrally located and is accented with modern finishes. A full bathroom and two additional large bedrooms offer plenty of space for guests, a home office, or an exercise room. The generous footprint of this home ensures that there is still plenty of storage space without compromising the size of the living areas. The over-sized 2-car garage has fit 3 vehicles in the past and the driveway is wide enough for 3 cars.  Better-than-new upgrades include: A radon mitigation system already in place, built-in custom closet organizers, Rainbird lawn irrigation system, black aluminum fence, all appliances including TV's and washer/dryer, Ethernet in 5 rooms, and custom plantation shutters. New roof 2021!  Fiber Internet is available nearby through i3 Broadband. Do not miss this completely move-in-ready home!

Enter into timeless charm with modern convenience in this beautifully updated historic two-story home in Champaign. Featuring 4 spacious bedrooms and 2.5 stylishly updated bathrooms, this home blends classic character with thoughtful upgrades throughout. The main level showcases brand-new laminate flooring while the upper level boasts warm hardwoods. Enjoy cooking and entertaining in the refreshed kitchen with updated appliances, and unwind in the generous primary suite with a large walk-in closet. The partially finished basement offers ample storage, and the attached 2-car garage includes durable epoxy flooring, shelving, new openers, and fresh gutters. Major updates include a new furnace for the lower level (2023), electric panel (2024), radon system (2025), water heater (2023), light fixtures, garage door openers, and more. Located near parks, restaurants, and shops, this home is a perfect blend of location, history, and modern living. ** VERY MOTIVATED SELLER! **

Charming and beautifully updated 4-bedroom, 2-bath home just two doors from Clark Park in one of the area's most desirable neighborhoods. This inviting home features a perfect blend of original character and modern upgrades, including refinished hardwood floors (2022), arched doorways, and a cozy living room with exposed brick and a fireplace. The bright dining area and semi-open kitchen offer great flow, with updated appliances (2022), new fixtures, a new sink and faucet, and a reverse osmosis water filtration system. (2025) The main level includes two spacious bedrooms with original hardwood flooring and a full bath.   Upstairs, you'll find two additional bedrooms and a remodeled full bath (2023), along with luxury vinyl plank flooring installed in 2023.    A large bonus room added to the back of the home provides flexible space perfect for a playroom, home office, or second living area, overlooking the private backyard. The full unfinished basement houses mechanicals, laundry, and ample storage space. Additional updates include knob-and-tube wiring removal, upgraded electrical panel, new overhead lighting and ceiling fans (2022), rebuilt chimney (2022), new refrigerator, stove, and dishwasher (2022), and a new water heater (2024). The home also offers a covered carport, charming front porch, and a peaceful back patio-ideal for enjoying the outdoors.  Located on a tree-lined street with mature landscaping and just steps from Clark Park, this home offers timeless style, modern comfort, and a vibrant neighborhood setting. A true Clark Park gem!

Introducing a beautifully designed new construction home in the desirable Savannah Green Subdivision, this two-story residence offers a spacious and modern layout perfect for comfortable living. The open-concept main floor features a bright eat-in kitchen, inviting living room, convenient laundry area, and a stylish half bath. Upstairs, the primary suite boasts a walk-in closet and a private en-suite bath, accompanied by two additional bedrooms and a second full bathroom. A detached two-car garage adds both function and charm to this thoughtfully planned home. Additional features include shaker-style cabinetry throughout, luxury vinyl flooring, upgraded lighting, and quality Delta plumbing fixtures.

Enjoy relaxing on the inviting front porch before stepping inside to discover a well-designed layout featuring 4 bedrooms, 3.5 bathrooms, and 2,820 sqft. of living space. The kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, a kitchen island with a breakfast bar, an eating area, and flows seamlessly into the family room with a cozy gas fireplace. A flexible front room, currently used as a living room, can easily function as a formal dining area or home office. A convenient half bath and drop zone are located just off the entrance to the two-car garage. Upstairs, you'll find three bedrooms, a centrally located laundry room, and a spacious primary suite with a walk-in closet and private bath that includes dual sinks, a jetted tub, and a separate shower. The finished basement adds even more living space with a fourth bedroom, an additional full bathroom, and a large rec room. Zoned heating and cooling provide enhanced comfort throughout the home. Outside, professional landscaping and a fenced backyard with a patio complete this beautifully maintained property.

Nestled in the heart of Champaign, this all-brick ranch home offers timeless construction and endless potential. Built in 1962 and boasting approximately 1,600 square feet, the home features three generously sized bedrooms including a primary suite with a private full bath and step-in shower, and an additional guest bathroom, and beautiful hardwood floors throughout the main living spaces. The expansive living room includes a wood-burning fireplace, while the adjacent dining area overlooks a spacious backyard and a screened-in porch, perfect for relaxing or entertaining. A bright kitchen with a breakfast nook offers room for personalization, and the full basement includes a second living space with additional fireplace, laundry area with washer and dryer, mechanicals, ample storage, and a storm shelter. Additional highlights include a cedar closet, an additional closet and linen closet as well as a spacious two-car garage with pull-down attic storage. Though the home has not seen recent updates to the kitchen and baths, it is ready for a new owner to make it their own. Home has been pre-inspected for your convenience-an excellent opportunity for those who want to make this their own.

Welcome to 303 Dropseed Drive in Savoy's sought-after Prairie Fields neighborhood! This classic two-story home offers more than 2,300 square feet of well-designed living space, a spacious fenced-in backyard, and fantastic curb appeal with a charming covered front porch.  Inside, you'll find a bright and open layout with a large family room anchored by a cozy gas fireplace, formal dining with a tray ceiling, and a generous kitchen with an additional dining area. Upstairs, the primary suite impresses with cathedral ceilings, a walk-in closet, dual vanities, a jetted tub, and a separate shower. Three additional bedrooms and a second full bath provide flexibility for guests, home offices, or growing households.  Need more space? The full unfinished basement is already plumbed for a future bathroom and ready for your custom finishing touch.  Located on a quiet street just minutes from parks, shopping, dining, and the University of Illinois, this move-in ready home blends comfort, space, and convenience.  Don't miss your chance to call this Prairie Fields gem your own - schedule your showing today!

Build your own memories!  This 4 year old home is bright, clean and ready to move-in.  An inviting covered porch greets you at the front door and an open floor plan provides a comfortable space for relaxing or spending time with friends and family.  The kitchen is the perfect spot with a large granite island that sets up great for cooking or entertaining as well as plenty of cabinets and counter space.  The primary bedroom is located on the north side of the home with a large walk-in closet and a private bath with dual vanities and a tiled shower with glass doors.  Two additional bedrooms are located on the opposite side of the home.  Both are spacious with large closets and have easy access to a hall bathroom.  Laundry and a large mudroom/locker area are located off the garage for extra convenience.  Updates include a fenced backyard and a new tile backsplash!

Great starter home to put some work into or investment.   Solid home, good siding and roof.   Features a front living room (portable fireplace works and can stay), kitchen has space for a small table, appliances stay.  There are 3 bedrooms and 1 bath.  Laundry room includes washer.  There are 2 outdoor sheds included too.  Window AC.  Older furnace but runs great.  Seller will include a 1 year home warranty if desired.  Most windows are replaced. This is an estate.

Discover this beautiful 3 bed, 2.5 bath home located in the desirable Lincolnshire Fields neighborhood! With thoughtful updates throughout like Pella windows, a kitchen remodel featuring heated floors and storage solutions throughout, this home offers upscale living with a contemporary design in a prime Champaign location. The main level features a spacious primary suite with an en-suite bathroom, and the first floor boasts a convenient powder bathroom and separate laundry room. The upstairs is bright and airy with fresh paint and carpet including a loft space, with two additional bedrooms and a full bathroom. The full basement, with its lofty ceilings, offers boundless potential for a workshop, exercise room, or additional storage. Venture into the backyard to discover your dream retreat-a custom-built study completed in 2016. This secluded haven echoes the main house's vintage allure, with vaulted ceilings, hardwood floors, and a full bath, creating an idyllic home office or artist's studio.    A garage door reveals a hidden nook for bikes and garden tools, ensuring every space is thoughtfully utilized. For those intrigued by the home's evolution, an extensive list of improvements is available upon request.    The Barnhart House is more than a home; it's a living piece of history, a canvas of memories waiting for your brushstroke. There is cottage like charm in our 2 bed/1 bath, 1,100 sq. ft. very well-maintained house, in the highly sought after neighborhood of Clark Park.

Just a few blocks from the park, for the past 2 years the house has been run and managed as a very successful Air B&B by a recent U of I Business school graduate. She has now moved to another state, and we are selling this property we have owned for more than 20 years. 

It's a perfect small home to live in, or to continue renting as an Air B&B.  Over the past 20 yrs. we have rented to many wonderful couples and grad students, and the house has never been empty for even a month. 

At present the house is perfectly furnished as an Air B&B and the furnishings are negotiable.  It has the capability to sleep as many as 8 people. 
 
There are 2 queen beds in the 15' x 11' 7" master bedroom with two generous closets.

A washer and laundry sinks are in the full basement.
